text:
The search engine (FreeBSD Mirror Sites http://mirrorlist.freebsd.org/FBSDsites.php) 
Offers one only country to search, Armenia.

Maintener : Jarrod Sayers.

How-To-Repeat: 1/ Access the website http://mirrorlist.freebsd.org/FBSDsites.php
2/ Open the country box, only Armenia is available
